signals.idea: Investigate and fix visual bug where large images on video editor preview render incorrectly — likely hitting Remotion/browser canvas size limits. Now that we push position/crop changes to Remotion live during drag, the bug affects both drag and static states. Key questions: (1) Is there a max canvas/element size in Remotion or the browser that we're exceeding when images are scaled very large (e.g., 2256x1692 on a 1920x1080 composition)? (2) Should we clamp the element to the visible composition area and adjust crop/position to compensate? (3) When the user drags the image back into view, should we restore the original dimensions? Investigate Remotion rendering limits, browser canvas limits, and implement proper bounds handling.

unresolved_flags.concern: Step 4 would create a preview/editor mismatch: clamping only in the Remotion render layer changes the media box that the user sees, but the overlay editor still derives handles and hitboxes from the raw clip metadata. Until Step 5 lands, the visible image and the draggable box will disagree.

The core fix assumes a browser/Remotion max-element limit is the active failure mode, but this repository's preview path is DOM-based, not canvas-based. A hard 8192px cap is not justified by the code here and may not address a preview bug at all.

The plan does not account for the existing full-bounds vs visible-bounds crop model. Persisting a clamped width/height back into clip state would discard the original full size, so restoring the original dimensions when the asset comes back into view becomes impossible and crop math can drift.

The overview is factually off about repository behavior: `ClipPanel` already constrains width/height inputs to the composition dimensions. Step 6 would not add the first UI guardrail; it would loosen the current cap from composition size to `MAX_ELEMENT_DIMENSION`, which is a product-behavior change the plan does not justify.

signals.loop_summary: Iteration 1. Weighted score trajectory: 8.0. Plan deltas: n/a. Recurring critiques: 0. Resolved flags: 0. Open significant flags: 4.

items: Large images (e.g., 2256×1692 on 1920×1080 comp) render correctly in the preview without visual artifacts
Drag/move operations with large images update Remotion live without rendering glitches
Resize operations cap element dimensions at a safe maximum (≤8192px or whatever threshold Step 2 identifies)
Crop operations work correctly on large/clamped images
No regression for normally-sized clips (≤ composition dimensions)
Exported video with large images renders correctly (no artifacts)
Numeric property inputs in ClipPanel enforce safe max dimensions
